lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Inara — Caspian Explorer
sources.what: Stock hull stats, Mk II module compatibility, and module sellers for this ship.

sources.label: Fandom — Caspian Explorer
sources.what: Manufacturer (Zorgon Peterson), Class-8 FSD / Mk II integration, and release history.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Caspian Explorer ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: YouTube — The Buur Pit
sources.what: Opinionated review of the Caspian Explorer covering its strengths and role as a deep-space explorer, plus the NPC on-foot changes.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Hands-on test pushing the Caspian Explorer's jump range and exploration performance to the limit.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Full breakdown of the Caspian Explorer update: Class-8 FSD, Mk II modules and optional-internal capacity.
